title: drynaria curvivenia
intro: Drynaria curvivenia, also known as the Chinese parasol or tian ma, is a type of medicinal plant that belongs to the fern family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Drynaria curvivenia include relieving pain and swelling, improving blood circulation, and reducing symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or capsule, and can also be found in herbal teas and supplements.
